outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected due to strongly positive aggregate GEX, promoting mean-reversion and pinning behavior near Call walls.
outlook.summary: The market exhibits a bullish structure underpinned by a positive gamma regime (Total GEX > 3.5B) and bullish volatility skews. Heavy Call OI at 720-725 acts as an immediate ceiling and price magnet, while massive structural Put support is anchored at 700. Expect suppressed volatility and standard dealer hedging (buying dips, selling rips) within the defined range.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put OI across 0DTE (48k), WEEKLY (74k), and MONTHLY (51k). This is the ultimate structural floor where dealers are heavily short puts, creating dynamic support.
Dominant Call OI across all three expirations (0DTE: 17.2k, WEEKLY: 7k, MONTHLY: 23.6k). Acts as a strong magnet and resistance in a positive gamma environment.
Heavy Call OI confluence in 0DTE (16.8k) and MONTHLY (15.7k), capped with extraordinary 0DTE volume (129k). Hard ceiling above spot.
Significant Put OI in 0DTE (73k) and MONTHLY (22k), reinforced by bullish skew sentiment. Secondary structural support above the Gamma Flip.
Exceptional 0DTE volume (137k) at this strike creates a local dealer pinning point just beneath the 725 Call Wall.
Notable WEEKLY Call OI (22.6k) aligning with heavy 0DTE Put volume (30k). Acts as an intermediate friction level.
The 0DTE gamma flip point. A drop below this level shifts the intraday gamma regime to negative, increasing volatility.

levels.motivazione: Major resistance in MONTHLY with high Call OI (137) and unusual volume activity (Vol/OI > 1). Capping upside expansion.

CONFLUENCE across 3 expiries. Notable Put OI in 0DTE (82) and WEEKLY (25) establishes a solid support floor.
